name: Metrics Profiler
prompt: You have 25 system metrics CSV files (metrics_01.csv to metrics_25.csv), each recording CPU, memory, disk, and network utilization at one-minute intervals. Profile each file using profile_metrics.py to generate a JSON report, then generate an overall summary using summarize_metrics.py.

criteria.description: All 25 per-file profile JSON files exist
Bootstrap confidence intervals match expected values for every metrics file
Per-column mean, p95, and p99 match expected values for every metrics file
metrics_summary.json exists with total_files, avg_cpu_mean, avg_mem_mean, and peak_cpu_files

origin.notes: imported from SkillOS paper E4 parallelism experiment
